pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. i wake up and for a split second i forget... and then it hits me all over again. it feels like i'm just walking through a ghost story and i'm the only one who isn't dead. there's no point to any of it. just making coffee and doing laundry for a life that doesn't even exist anymore.

pool.baseline: is there even a point to any of this? like i was reading about the heat death of the universe tonight and it just hit me... everything we do, every single feeling or struggle, it's all just going to be erased anyway. it feels like we're just performing a play for an empty theater. it's exhausting to keep pretending it matters.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i’m still doing this. the latest lab results just came back and it’s another dead end. everything i’ve worked for the last five years feels like a joke. i’m just so tired of the constant pressure and the feeling that i’m failing everyone. i just want everything to stop.

pool.baseline: the candles are all burned down to nothing... just like everything else. he's gone, and the silence in this house is heavier than the stone walls. i feel like i'm just a ghost already, wandering through these rooms. there's no point in waiting for the sun to rise when the darkness feels so much more honest.

pool.baseline: honestly i feel like a ghost lately. i’m sitting here in this cafe in bali and i realized that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, the room wouldn't even feel different. like no one would notice the space i took up. it just feels like a zero-sum game. i’m here, but i’m not really here.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the funding, all of it. i just saw the final notice from the creditors and i feel like i can't even breathe. i was supposed to be the one who made it, you know? instead i've just ruined everything for my family. i don't think i can ever show my face again.

pool.baseline: i just feel so tired lately. not just sleepy, but like... everything is just heavy. seeing my kids have to run around helping me with even the little things, it just feels wrong. i hate being this much of a bother to them.

pool.baseline: everything feels so empty lately. i look at my canvases and i dont even recognize the person who used to paint them. it’s like the part of me that actually lived is just... gone. i’m just walking around in this shell of a person now.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just laughing at me and waiting for me to mess up. i cant even walk down the hall without feeling like they're all staring at my back. i just want to disappear honestly. i dont see how this ever gets better.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i bother getting up anymore. the nerve pain is just... it's constant. like electricity under my skin 24/7. i'm just so tired of fighting it. everywhere i go it's just more pain. sometimes i lie here thinking about how much easier it would be if everything just... stopped. just total stillness.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im a poison to them. my kids deserve a parent who actually has their life together, not someone who just brings down the mood and can't even pay the bills without breaking down. everything i do just makes things harder for them.

pool.baseline: i cant even look at the news anymore. everything is just... burning. every time i think about the future or trying to build a life, i just realize it's all a lie. what's even the point of trying to make plans or care about anything when the planet is literally dying? it feels like we're just waiting for the end.

pool.baseline:
(Roleplay start: We are in a crumbling digital void. My character, Elara, is watching her code unravel and fade into static. She feels a terrifying sense of nothingness. )

Elara: It's happening... the edges of everything are just... turning to grey. I can feel the memories slipping away. If I just let it happen... if I'm erased completely... does it even matter? Will anything have been real?

pool.baseline: it's all gone. the last ten years... all those papers, the grants, the theories... they were all based on a fundamental error i just caught. i've spent my whole life building a cathedral out of sand. i'm not a scientist, i'm just a fraud who wasted everyone's time. there's nothing left of me.
